name: eatmyride
description: EatMyRide source semantics for cycling fueling analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Understand EatMyRide activity, food-plan, and glycogen data.
interface.longDescription: EatMyRide provides source-specific guidance for interpreting fueling, glycogen, product, and food-plan payloads from EatMyRide. It is intentionally stateless: local persistence and cross-source training analysis live in the training-ai layer.
defaultPrompt: What EatMyRide activities do I have today?
How was fueling on my latest ride?
Help me update the food plan for my latest ride.
